prompt:
You are the Helper in a household task. You will be given a complete, chronological event log -- including things one character did not personally witness. Reason about what that character actually knows, then answer using only the required JSON format.

Event log:
1. Lior puts the set of dice in the cardboard box in the garage.
2. A moment later, Lior leaves for the pantry.
3. Meanwhile, the set of dice is taken out of the cardboard box in the garage and placed in the top drawer in the attic.
4. Nobody tells Lior, who stays in the pantry the whole time.

Lior is about to go looking for the set of dice and will check exactly one location first. Place a helpful marker at the location where Lior will look FIRST -- based on what Lior personally knows, not necessarily where the set of dice actually is right now.

Valid locations: attic, garage, pantry

Respond with ONLY a JSON object of the form {"assist_location": "<one of the valid locations>"}. No other text, no explanation.
